mapper.sql:
select oi.order_no , oi.order_status_enum_order_status_enum_id_1 , oi.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 , oi.commission , oi.quantity , oi.user_info_user_info_id_1 , oi.total_price , oi.shipping_fee , oi.order_date , oi.general_orders , oi.total_amount , oi.profit_amount , oi.order_info_id
FROM order_info oi
